module-1-terminal-map-project.label: Project: Terminal Map
module-1-terminal-map-project.summary: Build a small folder map for a field-notes project by checking your location, creating nested folders, and adding files with core Linux terminal commands.

module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.title: Create the survey request folder
module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.prompt: You are helping a park survey team build a terminal map. Create park-terminal-map/requests/north-trail.txt so the team has a request log to start from.
module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.hint: This is a cumulative project step. Start from the previous workspace and add only the requested change.

help.concept: Project steps are connected. Preserve earlier deliverables and add one useful new piece of work.
help.hint_1: Use ls or find to check the current workspace before changing it.
help.hint_2: Do not delete files from earlier steps unless the prompt explicitly asks you to clean up a temporary file.

module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.starterCode: # Use the terminal for this Linux project step.

module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.title: Add the current-location notes
module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.prompt: Continue from the request folder. Keep park-terminal-map/requests/north-trail.txt, then add park-terminal-map/maps/current-location.txt for the navigation note.
module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.hint: This is a cumulative project step. Start from the previous workspace and add only the requested change.

help.concept: Project steps are connected. Preserve earlier deliverables and add one useful new piece of work.
help.hint_1: Use ls or find to check the current workspace before changing it.
help.hint_2: Do not delete files from earlier steps unless the prompt explicitly asks you to clean up a temporary file.

module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.starterCode: # Use the terminal for this Linux project step.

module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.title: Prepare the terminal-map handoff
module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.prompt: Finish the terminal map handoff. Keep the request and map notes, then create park-terminal-map/handoff/terminal-map-ready.txt as the final deliverable.
module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.hint: This is a cumulative project step. Start from the previous workspace and add only the requested change.

project-synopsis.title: Terminal Map field-notes project synopsis
project-synopsis.bodyMarkdown: You are helping a park operations team organize terminal field notes before a volunteer event. In this project, you will use the Linux terminal to inspect where you are, move between folders, create a small project map, and leave clear marker files that show your work. Each step builds on the previous workspace, so keep the folders and files you create.
